name: Marbled Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Pumpkin, solid pack (16 oz. can)
recipeInstructions:
FOR CRUST: In a medium bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, sugar and butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a greased 10-inch springform pan. Sprinkle with 1 cup chocolate morsels.
FOR CHEESECAKE: In a small, heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the remaining chocolate morsels, stirring constantly until smooth. In a large mixing bowl, beat together cream cheese, granulated sugar and brown sugar. Beat in pumpkin. Beat in eggs and evaporated milk. Stir in cornstarch, cinnamon and nutmeg.
Remove 1 cup of the pumpkin batter; stir into the melted chocolate. Pour the remaining pumpkin batter into the springform pan. Pour the chocolate mixture over the top; swirl.
Bake in a preheated 325 degree oven for 60 minutes, or until the edge of the filling is set. Turn off the oven and allow the cheesecake to stand in the oven for 30 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool completely. Cover and chill for several hours.
